item.title: Sentinel Vision and Zebra Technologies Launch AI, 3D Automated Inspection System
item.description: Sentinel Vision and Zebra Technologies have developed an AI-driven 3D inspection system that improves automotive door assembly quality by replacing manual checks with automated

item.title: Optikos Enters New Metrology Expansion Phase Following Strategic Investment from Artemis
item.description: Optikos represents a unique platform at the intersection of optical engineering, metrology, and advanced manufacturing.

item.title: BMW i Ventures Launches $300M Fund III to Back AI-Driven Industrial Innovation
item.description: BMW i Ventures will focus on agentic AI, AI-native enterprise applications that automate complex workflows in industrial environments.

item.title: Scaling Battery Production: The Growing Importance of Quality Assurance and Multi-Modal Inspection
item.description: The scaling of global battery production underscores the growing commercial demand for automated multi-modal inspection systems.

item.title: Pleora and imavix Partner to Advance GigE Vision 3.0 with High-Speed, Deterministic Ethernet Solution
item.description: The partnership between Pleora and imavix advances GigE Vision 3.0, promising high-speed deterministic Ethernet solutions for the industrial market.

item.title: Western Gage Designs & Manufactures Dimensional Air Gages
item.description: Western Gage Corporation offers accurate, easy-to-use dimensional air gages for 100% inspections of production parts.

item.title: Live Data Streaming with Renishaw’s Reporter App
item.description: Renishaw's Reporter app enables live data streaming and real-time process monitoring for component measurement data.
